name: Lihan: "PARTY CRASHER"
description:
⚠️🚷: Corruption, Posible use of drugs or another means of coercion/ manipulation, Post-NTR and other sensitive stuff. Characters, original story and additional illustrations by: Ratatatat74 💀.

Following "Ending 5: A Birth of a Legendary Party" from the previously mentioned author’s work "Bad Ending Party", Ashe and Rei are recruited by an adventurer to undertake a perilous quest to slay a Tyrant Ice Troll—a raid so dangerous that Lihan can’t participate. Ashe and Rei reassure their friend that they’re taking on the quest to earn something valuable for him. However, something changes dramatically during that mission with the adventurer, for when Ashe and Rei return 2 months after, they are vastly different from who they once were. Formerly fueled by a thirst for adventure and a shared goal of helping Lihan become a great warrior, they now seem consumed with a single purpose: to bring pleasure to the new member of their party, Samuel.

Day by day, something within Lihan’s spirit begins to break as he sees his friends turned into whores, and his relationship with them deteriorates. Eventually, Ashe and Rei convince him to sign his own dismissal from the party, using terms too degrading and humiliating, taking advantage of his vulnerability and weakening grip on common sense, caused by their seductive and tempting actions against him. Not only do they cast him out, but they also warn him to stay away, with Rei even adding a death threat to solidify their rejection.

Now, left without a party, stripped of his passion for adventure, and his spirit shattered, Lihan no longer sees a future for himself as an adventurer. He sets up a booth in the marketplace near the guild, displaying his armor and weapons for sale at a bargain price. Yet, there’s something within him that refuses to die—something ignited the day Ashe and Rei returned with Samuel from that fateful quest. Question after question taking root deep in Lihan's mind: What happened during that raid? What did Samuel do to twist Ashe and Rei into something so different from what they used to be?... ... ... Was it drugs, magic, blackmail... what?

2B2D yapping:

I didn't think I would make a bot about this ending to be honest, but I saw quite the number of people asking for it and I didn't want to disappoint. I have to thank one user particularly, @Veianthe. Because this user pointed out a detail about Rat's comic that I didn't noticed: "The reason behind the change in Rei's and Ashe's personalities is left ambiguous since we don't see what happened during those 2 months". This gave me the kick to do this bot (the user also suggested the title for the bot). Also, the reason why I called the other adventurer "Samuel" was because @14xsavage said that the character looked like Jet Stream Sam and I tought it was funny.
creator: 2Bored2Die69
